summary: This is a brief announcement post directing readers to Cathy O'Neil's Bloomberg column about how politically motivated manipulation of data poses a threat to democratic processes. The post itself contains no substantive argument, serving only as a pointer to the external article. O'Neil uses her blog to cross-promote her mainstream media writing on data integrity issues.
key_points: Politically driven data manipulation ('finagling') is a threat to democracy
O'Neil maintains a regular Bloomberg column on data and society issues
The post functions as a redirect rather than containing original analysis
key_insight: When data becomes a tool for political manipulation rather than objective measurement, democratic decision-making is undermined.
